[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


[1m› [0mRun exactly this command: bash -lc 'printf probe'. Do not do anything else.


[1m[38;5;2m•[0m [1mRan[0m [38;2;137;180;250mbash[38;2;147;153;178m -[38;2;235;160;172mlc[38;2;205;214;244m [38;2;166;227;161m'printf probe'[39m
[2m  └ probe[0m

[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

• [0mprobe

[2m────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


[1m› [0m[38;5;6m/permissions[39m experimental


[2m• [0mI can’t change permissions directly from here. If you want to run a command or task that needs approval, send it and
  I’ll request escalation when required.


  [1mKeymap[0m
